input.content:
Subject: Scheduled System Maintenance Notification – Saturday, [Date]

Dear Valued Users,

We are writing to inform you of an important scheduled maintenance window that will affect our services.

**Maintenance Details:**

Date: Saturday, [Date]
Time: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM (EST/CST)
Duration: Approximately 4 hours

During this maintenance window, the following services will be temporarily unavailable:
• Web Application Portal
• API Services
• Customer Support Portal
• Mobile Applications

**What You Need to Know:**

We recommend that you:
• Plan any critical transactions before 2:00 AM on Saturday
• Save your work and log out before the maintenance begins
• Avoid scheduling automated tasks or integrations during this window
• Expect brief service interruptions as systems come back online

**Expected Impact:**

This maintenance is essential to enhance system performance, security, and reliability. We anticipate minimal disruption, and all services should be fully restored by 6:00 AM.

**Support:**

If you experience any issues after the maintenance window or have questions, please contact our support team at support@[company.com] or call [support-number]. Our team will be available to assist you starting at 6:00 AM.

We appreciate your patience and understanding as we continue to improve our services. Thank you for your business.

Best regards,

[Your Company Name]
Operations & Infrastructure Team
[contact information]
[website]

final_response:
Perfect! I've created a professional email notification about the scheduled maintenance and saved it to `/workspace/maintenance-email.txt`. 

The email includes:
- **Clear subject line** with maintenance date
- **Specific timing details** (2 AM - 6 AM Saturday)
- **Services affected** listing
- **Actionable recommendations** for users
- **Impact assessment** and expected recovery time
- **Support contact information**
- **Professional tone and structure**
